name: doctor: the cloud-conventions check does not mistake an ordinary package.json or config.yaml for IaC (no false positive, stays skipped)
command:
mkdir -p repo && printf '{"name":"my-app","scripts":{"test":"jest"}}' > repo/package.json && printf 'key: value
list:
  - a
' > repo/config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --check cloud-conventions --root repo
